content.text:
{"number":1,"title":"Add Finnish (fi) locale placeholder","body":"Routine locale addition that establishes the placeholder ARB file pattern for new locales going forward.

- `pubspec.yaml`: declare `intl_fi` under `flutter_localizations.supportedLocales`
- `lib/l10n/intl_fi.arb`: empty ARB so the generator has a target

No string translations included; this is just scaffolding. The German PR will follow the same shape.

name: inkino
description: A new Flutter application.

dependencies:
  core:
    path: ../core
  flutter:
    sdk: flutter
  flutter_localizations:
    sdk: flutter
  xml: ^3.0.0
  flutter_redux: ^0.5.0
  intl: ^0.15.2
  url_launcher: ^3.0.0
  path_provider: ^0.4.0
  key_value_store_flutter: ^1.0.0

dev_dependencies:
  flutter_test:
    sdk: flutter
  mockito: ^3.0.0
  image_test_utils: ^1.0.0

flutter:
  uses-material-design: true
  assets:
  - assets/images/1x1_transparent.png
  - assets/images/powered_by_tmdb.png
  - assets/images/background_image.jpg
  - assets/images/logo.png

name: core
description: Common shared code for inKino mobile and web.
version: 0.0.1
#homepage: https://www.example.com
#author: ironman <email@example.com>

environment:
  sdk: '>=2.0.0-dev.58.0 <3.0.0'

dependencies:
  redux: ^3.0.0
  xml: ^3.0.1
  intl: any
  http: ^0.12.0
  reselect: ^0.4.0
  key_value_store: ^1.0.0
  kt_dart: ^0.5.0

dev_dependencies:
  test: ^1.3.0
  mockito: ^3.0.0
  intl_translation: 0.17.0

data.content:
## Recommendation

To add German (`de`) support, the following files need to be created or modified, following the same pattern already established for Finnish (`fi`) and English (`en`):

1. **`core/lib/src/i18n/inkino_de.arb`** (new) — the German ARB translations file, structured identically to `inkino_fi.arb` and `inkino_en.arb` with the same set of message keys and German string values.

2. **`core/lib/src/i18n/inkino_messages_de.dart`** (new) — the per‑locale generated messages library; this can be produced by running `intl_translation:generate_from_arb` on the new ARB file, but it must exist so that the all‑messages aggregator can import it.

3. **`core/lib/src/i18n/inkino_messages_all.dart`** (edit) — add a deferred import for `inkino_messages_de.dart`, an entry in `_deferredLibraries` (`'de': () => messages_de.loadLibrary()`), and a `case 'de'` branch in `_findExact`.

4. **`mobile/lib/main.dart`** (edit) — add `const Locale('de', 'DE')` to the `supportedLocales` list so the `MaterialApp` recognizes German.

5. **`mobile/lib/message_provider.dart`** (edit) — add `'de'` to the language‑code list inside `isSupported` so the `InKinoLocalizationsDelegate` accepts German locales.

6. **`mobile/pubspec.yaml`** (edit) — per the pattern described in PR #1, declare `intl_de` under `flutter_localizations.supportedLocales` to make the German locale data available to the intl subsystem and the code generator.
